title: The secret of success — новые слова

items.example: You can achieve anything if you work hard.
Winning the competition was a great achievement.
She finally reached her goal of running a marathon.
If you want to succeed, you must believe in yourself.
Learning a new language is a real accomplishment.
It takes years to master a skill like playing the violin.
He worked hard to pass the exam.
You need to focus on your goal.
If you believe in yourself, you can achieve anything.
She's a high achiever who always does her best.
Everyone should have the opportunity to learn.
